run.window_note: Strict 72h (June 6-9) yielded 1 verified item; expanded to 5 days (June 4-9) per skill rule

items.title: Apple iOS 27 opens Siri AI to Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini via Extensions framework

key_claims.claim: Gemini model powers rebuilt Siri
Third-party AI selectable from Settings (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini)
iPhone 11 and later supported
Not available EU or China at launch
~$1B/year licensing deal with Google
key_claims.source: CNBC/Engadget citing Apple briefings (T3, unconfirmed in press release)

key_claims.claim: ~1.2 trillion parameter Gemini model
key_claims.source: TechCrunch citing Apple briefings (T3, unconfirmed in press release)

caveats: Apple press release does not disclose $1B/year figure or 1.2T parameter count — both from T3 media reports
Features announced for Fall 2026; not yet shipped
Privacy boundary at Gemini routing tier not formally documented
Not available EU or China at initial launch

items.title: OpenAI overhauls ChatGPT memory with Dreaming V3 background synthesis

key_claims.claim: 5x compute reduction vs prior memory system
key_claims.source: OpenAI primary (vendor-claimed, T4 for the efficiency claim)

key_claims.claim: Rollout: Plus/Pro US first
Memory Summary audit page
Weights memories by freshness, continuity, relevance

caveats: 5x compute efficiency is vendor-claimed; no independent benchmark
Data retention policies for synthesized memory snapshots not detailed in announcement

items.title: Cursor SDK adds custom tools, auto-review routing, and recursive subagents

key_claims.claim: Custom tools exposed via local.customTools through built-in MCP server
Auto-review routes tool calls via permissions.json classifier
Nested subagents to any depth
JSONL and custom store backends supported

items.title: xAI Grok Voice rolls out to all users on web and mobile
items.primary_url_note: Returned HTTP 403 during this run; confirmed via @elonmusk on X and multiple secondary outlets

key_claims.claim: Available to all Grok users, not SuperGrok-only
Voice cloning available in API tier

caveats: Primary source (x.ai/news) unreachable during this run; graded T3 secondary
Voice cloning is a separate API-tier feature from base Grok Voice

items.title: Anthropic publishes analysis of recursive self-improvement risk
items.coi: Jack Clark is co-founder of Anthropic

key_claims.claim: Claude authored >80% of Anthropic production code in May 2026
Anthropic engineers ship ~8x code per quarter vs 2021-2025 baseline
Calls for internationally coordinated pause mechanism analogous to nuclear arms control

caveats: COI: Jack Clark is co-founder of Anthropic; treat productivity/capability claims about Claude with appropriate weight
The 8x engineer output figure and 80% AI-authored code figure are self-reported by Anthropic

items.title: US Congress releases bipartisan Great American AI Act discussion draft

key_claims.claim: 269-page discussion draft released June 4
Three-year federal preemption of state AI laws
$100M annual NIST Center for AI Standards and Innovation
Bipartisan: Obernolte (R-CA) + Trahan (D-MA)

caveats: Discussion draft only; no formal introduction, no legislative force yet
Public Citizen flags preemption clause as removing state-level consumer/worker protections before federal replacement exists
Colorado AI Act (June 30) and EU AI Act (August 2) proceed regardless of this draft's fate
